tasks.label: Build (current file)
tasks.command: /usr/bin/clang++ -std=c++20 -g -fdiagnostics-color=always "${file}" -o "${fileDirname}/${fileBasenameNoExtension}" $(/opt/homebrew/bin/pkg-config --cflags --libs sdl2 SDL2_image SDL2_ttf SDL2_mixer arrow eigen3)
tasks.detail: clang++ -std=c++20 + all SDL2/Arrow/Eigen flags via pkg-config
